name: instagram-mcp
description: Instagram MCP Server - Access Instagram public data including user profiles, posts, and media content
author: instagram-mcp

search_users.name: search_users
search_users.description: Search Instagram users by username or display name

query.description: Username or full name to search for

get_user_profile.name: get_user_profile
get_user_profile.description: Get detailed profile information of an Instagram user

get_user_posts.name: get_user_posts
get_user_posts.description: Get posts from a specific Instagram user with pagination support

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for loading more posts (optional)

get_post_details.name: get_post_details
get_post_details.description: Get detailed information about a specific Instagram post including images, videos, and engagement stats

post_shortcode.description: Instagram post shortcode extracted from the URL (e.g., DOZirOEEkZ6 from /p/DOZirOEEkZ6/)

configure_proxy.name: configure_proxy
configure_proxy.description: Configure proxy settings for accessing Instagram (required for first-time setup). Restart required after configuration.

update_proxy_config.name: update_proxy_config
update_proxy_config.description: Update or change proxy settings without restarting the server. Browser will be automatically reset with new proxy settings.

close_browser.name: close_browser
close_browser.description: Manually close the browser instance to free up resources. Browser will auto-reopen on next request if needed.

examples.title: Search and view user profile
examples.description: Find an Instagram user and view their profile information

examples.title: View user's recent posts
examples.description: Get the latest posts from a specific user

examples.title: Get post details
examples.description: View detailed information about a specific post

configuration.note: When proxy is not configured, only 'configure_proxy' is shown. After proxy is configured, 'update_proxy_config' and 'close_browser' become available.

first_time_setup.description: First-time setup requires configuring a proxy server

limitations: Requires proxy configuration for network access
Subject to rate limiting from Instagram/imginn
May encounter Cloudflare challenges that require waiting
